name: humanenv
description: Securely inject environment variables into your app. Secrets for humans only.
author: arancibiajav@gmail.com

scripts.dev:pk:clear: sqlite3 ~/.humanenv/humanenv.db "DELETE FROM server_config WHERE key='pk_hash';" && rm -f ~/.humanenv/temporal-pk.dat && echo "PK cleared"
scripts.dev:pk:status: echo "PK hash:" && sqlite3 ~/.humanenv/humanenv.db "SELECT value FROM server_config WHERE key='pk_hash';" 2>/dev/null || echo "none" && echo "Temporal PK file:" && [ -f ~/.humanenv/temporal-pk.dat ] && echo "exists" || echo "none"
scripts.docker:pk:clear: docker compose -f docker-compose.server.yml exec humanenv-server sh -c "sqlite3 /data/humanenv/humanenv.db \"DELETE FROM server_config WHERE key='pk_hash';\" && rm -f /data/humanenv/temporal-pk.dat && echo 'PK cleared'"
scripts.docker:pk:generate: docker compose -f docker-compose.server.yml exec -T humanenv-server node --import tsx /app/scripts/pk-generate.ts
scripts.docker:pk:status: docker compose -f docker-compose.server.yml exec humanenv-server sh -c 'echo "PK hash:" && sqlite3 /data/humanenv/humanenv.db "SELECT value FROM server_config WHERE key='\''pk_hash'\''" 2>/dev/null || echo "none" && echo "Temporal PK file:" && [ -f /data/humanenv/temporal-pk.dat ] && echo "exists" || echo "none"'
scripts.docker:db:shell: docker compose -f docker-compose.server.yml exec humanenv-server sqlite3 /data/humanenv/humanenv.db
scripts.docker:mongo:pk:clear: docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE:-docker-compose.server.yml} exec -T humanenv-server node /app/scripts/mongo-pk.ts clear && docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE:-docker-compose.server.yml} exec humanenv-server rm -f /data/humanenv/temporal-pk.dat 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.docker:mongo:pk:status: docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE:-docker-compose.server.yml} exec -T humanenv-server node /app/scripts/mongo-pk.ts status
scripts.docker:mongo:db:shell: docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE:-docker-compose.server.yml} exec -T humanenv-server node /app/scripts/mongo-pk.ts shell
scripts.docker:mongo:pk:reset: docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE:-docker-compose.server.yml} exec -T humanenv-server node /app/scripts/mongo-pk.ts reset && docker compose -f ${COMPOSE_FILE:-docker-compose.server.yml} exec humanenv-server rm -f /data/humanenv/temporal-pk.dat 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.docker:pk:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.server.yml exec -T humanenv-server node /app/scripts/sqlite-reset.ts && docker compose -f docker-compose.server.yml exec humanenv-server rm -f /data/humanenv/temporal-pk.dat 2>/dev/null || true
